ddls:
CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "database_type" TEXT /* Type of the database (e.g., relational, NoSQL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the database was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the database was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the database is active or archived */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each table */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the table belongs to */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the table is active or archived */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tables_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "columns" (
  "column_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each column */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table the column belongs to */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the column */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the column */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the column was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the column was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the column is active or archived */,
  "nullable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the column can contain null values */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the column */,
  "constraints" TEXT /* Any constraints (e.g., primary key, foreign key) on the column */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("column_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_columns_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "column_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each column statistic */,
  "column_id" INTEGER /* ID of the column the statistic belongs to */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value in the column */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value in the column */,
  "cardinality" INTEGER /* Cardinality of the column */,
  "num_unique_values" INTEGER /* Number of unique values in the column */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the statistics are active or archived */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the column */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median value of the column */,
  "mode_value" TEXT /* Mode value of the column */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the column */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_column_statistics_column_id FOREIGN KEY ("column_id") REFERENCES columns ("column_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data distribution */,
  "column_id" INTEGER /* ID of the column the distribution belongs to */,
  "distribution_type" TEXT /* Type of data distribution (e.g., normal, uniform) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the data distribution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distribution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distribution was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the distribution is active or archived */,
  "skewness" REAL /* Skewness of the data distribution */,
  "kurtosis" REAL /* Kurtosis of the data distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_distribution_column_id FOREIGN KEY ("column_id") REFERENCES columns ("column_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data analysis */,
  "column_id" INTEGER /* ID of the column the analysis belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of data analysis (e.g., mean, median, mode) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the data analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the analysis is active or archived */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the analysis in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_column_id FOREIGN KEY ("column_id") REFERENCES columns ("column_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active or archived */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the permission belongs to */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table the permission belongs to */,
  "column_id" INTEGER /* ID of the column the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the permission is active or revoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_column_id FOREIGN KEY ("column_id") REFERENCES columns ("column_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the report belongs to */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table the report belongs to */,
  "column_id" INTEGER /* ID of the column the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is active or archived */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the report generation in seconds */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_column_id FOREIGN KEY ("column_id") REFERENCES columns ("column_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the action was performed on */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table the action was performed on */,
  "column_id" INTEGER /* ID of the column the action was performed on */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., read, write) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the log entry is active or archived */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_column_id FOREIGN KEY ("column_id") REFERENCES columns ("column_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the configuration is active or archived */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
